home.heroTitle: From sea to shore, your trusted engineering partner
home.heroSubtitle: High-standard engineering services spanning shipyard new-build and repair, steel construction, infrastructure, and civil construction.
home.servicesHeadline: shipyard new-build to steel construction, infrastructure to civil works — full-spectrum engineering.
home.statementTitle2: From field to port, without interruption
home.statementCaption: Our team is on-site at every stage — delivering your projects on time, with transparent communication and the highest standards.
home.fieldTitle: Built with trust. Delivered on time.

services.pageTitle: End-to-end engineering, at sea and on land
services.pageIntro: From shipyard new-build and repair to steel construction, infrastructure, and civil works — four core areas backed by field experience and engineering discipline.
services.detailCta: Have a project in this area? Tell us about it.

tersaneGemiInsa.title: Shipyard New-Build
tersaneGemiInsa.description: Expertise in pre-fabrication, block joining, steel, outfitting, piping, and insulation for military and civil vessel projects.
tersaneGemiInsa.detail: In new-build, NFT Group has served on both military and civil projects. We hold expertise in pre-fabrication, block joining, steel, outfitting, piping, and insulation work. We've taken active roles in keel-laying operations, ship launch operations, stem-post fabrication, and hull heat-straightening in the new-build yard.

tersaneTamir.title: Shipyard Repair
tersaneTamir.description: Hull steel, outfitting, chrome, copper, aluminum, and steel repair and replacement; ship recycling and dismantling operations.
tersaneTamir.detail: In repair, we handle hull-wide steel and outfitting repairs, chrome, copper, PVC, aluminum, and steel material repair and replacement, and piping outfitting work. We also have the capacity for ship dismantling, recycling project operations, and floating dock repair, maintenance, and overhaul.
items: Chrome, copper, PVC, aluminum, steel repair

altyapiVeCelikInsa.title: Infrastructure & Steel Construction
altyapiVeCelikInsa.description: Infrastructure, steel building construction, workshop construction, steel structures, roofing, platforms, and ironwork.
altyapiVeCelikInsa.detail: We have experience in infrastructure, steel building construction, infrastructural piping work (natural gas, plumbing, etc.), and workshop construction including panel cladding and crane rail installation. Our project history includes steel structures such as enclosed spaces, roofing, platforms, pergolas and rest areas, exhibition spaces, and canopies. We also handle ironwork, bending, wrought iron, and light steel work in-house.

insaatSektoru.title: Construction
insaatSektoru.description: Reinforced concrete buildings, facade insulation, pool construction, architectural support, and 3D presentation services.
insaatSektoru.detail: In construction, we provide reinforced concrete homes and buildings, facade insulation solutions, tiling work, landscaping, pool construction, wooden pergola and roofing work, renovation projects, architectural support, 3D presentation, and process consulting services.

about.teaserTitle: A trusted engineering team in shipyard and construction;
about.pageTitle: A young, dynamic, and solution-driven engineering team
about.pageIntro: We bring together work discipline, an engineering perspective, and field experience to deliver timely, dependable service to our clients.
about.principlesLeadIn: NFT Group is built on a simple idea:
about.principlesHeadline: engineering should be reliable, not complicated. We hold everything on site to the same standard.

principles.title: Reliability
principles.description: Transparent communication means you always know what's happening, at every stage of your project.

principles.title: Adaptability
principles.description: Site conditions change; our team and plan flex to your project instead of working against it.

principles.title: Focus
principles.description: Every step, from engineering to the field, works together — so your project moves without friction.

about.workforceMessage: Behind every project stands a team that puts on the hard hat, clips in the harness, and does the work with real craftsmanship.

projects.pageIntro: A selection from our shipyard and construction sites. The gallery is updated regularly.
projects.emptyState: The gallery will be here soon.

featured.title: On-site for an international ferry delivery
featured.description: Our team worked on block joining, steel, and outfitting during the new-build process of a passenger and vehicle ferry. The vessel was launched in a formal ceremony and delivered to an international operator.

news.kicker: From the field and the industry,
news.pageIntro: Up-to-date insights and field experience from shipbuilding, repair, steel construction, and civil construction.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.intro: We've gathered the questions we hear most about our projects and how we work. Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out directly.
faq.imageCaption: From the field, a real hull-block lift in progress.

scope.question: What kind of projects do you work on?
scope.answer: We provide end-to-end engineering across four core areas — shipyard new-build and repair, steel construction, infrastructure, and civil construction — for both military and civil projects.

locations.question: Do you only operate in Yalova?
locations.answer: Our main yard is based in Altınova/Yalova, but our teams carry out field operations on shipyard and construction projects across Türkiye.

timeline.question: How long does a project take?
timeline.answer: Timelines vary with project scope, scale, and site conditions. After we receive your request, our team runs a site survey and engineering assessment to give you a clear schedule.

quote.question: How do I get a quote?
quote.answer: Just share your project type and details through the contact form. Our team will get back to you within 1 business day to plan the next steps.

military.question: Do you have experience with military projects?
military.answer: Yes. We've worked on both military and civil projects in new-build and repair, with expertise in block joining, steel, outfitting, piping, and insulation work.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Share your project details and we'll get back to you shortly.
